sourceFamilies.notes: Search configured local/cache source packages first, including the current FlightGear DC-9-32 source package. Do not execute downloaded repository scripts.
Use the DC-9-51 N775NC cockpit photo as the target visual reference and nearby DC-9 references only for shared material/layout cues.
Record variant/operator/registration evidence before marking any candidate exact, same-family, nearby-variant, or rejected.

requestedComponents.label: cockpit shell and main panel blockout
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Use the DC-9-51 primary image for silhouette, panel density, windshield framing, and color family. Source geometry may be mixed only when variant scope is recorded.

requestedComponents.label: captain and first-officer yoke pair
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prioritize shape, placement, checklist placard, and column hierarchy. Record pivot/animation evidence and downstream repair needs.

requestedComponents.label: throttle pedestal blockout and source candidates
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Use photo for placement and broad shape. Require rejected/selected source candidate records before assembly.

requestedComponents.label: main panel gauge density set
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Represent dense analog gauge clusters without operational training detail. Source exact gauge candidates separately when available.

requestedComponents.label: overhead panel density placeholder
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Use primary image for position and density only. Do not finalize switch layout without close-up sources.
